sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36330" key="e)/ntropon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔντροπ-ον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, an <sense id="n36330.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ornament,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:96" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.96</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
